description_long: This is an adult male pedestrian dressed in casual urban attire. He wears a short-sleeved button-up shirt over a t-shirt, paired with knee-length shorts and lace-up sneakers. Accessories include a flat-brimmed cap and eyeglasses, giving him a relaxed, everyday appearance suitable for city environments. His posture is upright with arms slightly extended, and his facial features are partially obscured by the cap and glasses. The clothing fits loosely, suggesting comfort and practicality for walking or standing outdoors. The overall look is typical of a city dweller or someone casually strolling through an urban neighborhood.
description: A casually dressed adult male pedestrian wearing a cap, glasses, button-up shirt, t-shirt, shorts, and sneakers. His relaxed, upright stance and accessories suggest a typical city dweller.
description_view_0: Front view shows the face, glasses, cap, open shirt over a t-shirt, shorts, and sneakers with arms slightly outstretched.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the cap, glasses, shirt sleeve, shorts, and sneaker, with the arm hanging straight.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the cap, shirt, shorts, and sneakers, with both arms visible from behind.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile of the cap, glasses, shirt, shorts, and sneaker, with the arm hanging straight.
attribute_clothing_type: casual short-sleeved button-up shirt over a t-shirt, knee-length shorts, and a flat-brimmed cap
attribute_hairstyle: short hair mostly covered by cap
